extDescription.message: Categorize your Amazon purchases locally using keyword/ASIN rules and mark each item as deductible and business/personal, without sending anything to the cloud.

syncRulesetConsent.message: Only your categorization rules will sync — never your purchase data.

welcomeStep1.message: Go to your Amazon order history and click the extension icon to read orders from the page.

welcomeStep2.message: Or export your order history CSV from Amazon and import it with the Import CSV button.

welcomePrivacyNote.message: Your purchase data never leaves your device. Rules can optionally sync across devices.

updateReviewPrompt.message: If you find this extension useful, please leave a review — it helps others discover it!

errorCsvFormat.message: CSV format not recognized. Please use the Amazon order history export.

errorStorageFull.message: Storage full. Try clearing old flags in Options.

errorScrapeFailed.message: Could not read orders from this page. Make sure you are on an Amazon order history page.

privacyNoDataLeaves.message: All your purchase data stays on your device. Only rules can optionally sync.

notAffiliated.message: Not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by Amazon. Amazon and all related marks are trademarks of Amazon.com, Inc. or its affiliates.
